company.title: Essex Property Trust
company.extract: Essex Property Trust is a publicly traded real estate investment trust that invests in apartments in California and in the Seattle metropolitan area.

city.title: The Bronx
city.extract: The Bronx is the northernmost of the five boroughs of New York City, coextensive with Bronx County, in the U.S. state of New York. The borough shares a land border with Westchester County, New York to its north; to its south and west, the New York City borough of Manhattan lies across the Harlem River; and to its south and east is the borough of Queens, across the East River. The Bronx, the only New York City borough located primarily on the U.S. mainland, has a land area of 42 square miles (109 km2) and a population of 1,472,654 at the 2020 census. It has the fourth-largest area, fourth-highest population, and third-highest population density of the boroughs.

reviews.text: There hasn’t been Hot water for 2 weeks in this building !!! Freezing temperature outside , snowing , and management still doesn’t respond. This building has had 8 violations and more than 100 complaints in the last 2 weeks because of NO hot water (check hpd site) Poor management, cheaply made build

reviews.author: Channeling Imogene
reviews.text: Over priced cold apartments with electric heaters that do not help. Summer time the apartment is an oven. Winter season it is a freezer. Con Ed bill in the hundreds. pain_points.label: High Lead Volume Overload
pain_points.description: High rental demand combined with a large property footprint likely floods property managers with inquiries. Manual handling causes slow response times and lost leases — precisely where EliseAI's automated engagement wins.

pain_points.label: Premium Market — Instant Response Required
pain_points.description: Walk Score 93 and median household income $168,917 signal a quality renter base with high service expectations. Delayed responses directly cost leases; EliseAI provides 24/7 instant engagement.

pain_points.label: Harsh Operating Conditions
pain_points.description: Challenging conditions (frequent precipitation (177 days/yr)) increase maintenance coordination load and incident management. Automated tenant communication keeps residents informed without burdening staff.

pain_points.label: Long Waiting Times
pain_points.description: EliseAI detected long waiting times for in-person property visits, with one tenant waiting over 2.5 hours for a scheduled tour.

pain_points.label: Prolonged Service Disruptions
pain_points.description: There have been significant disruptions to core services, with hot water outages lasting 2 weeks amidst harsh winter conditions, affecting tenant comfort and safety.

outreach.subject: Units sitting empty
outreach.message:
Your building is in a neighborhood with a Walk Score of 93, where the median household income is around $169,000, and renters expect a high level of service. This means your team needs to be highly responsive to meet the demands of these renters. Your team's speed and responsiveness can make all the difference in securing leases and renewals.

 At Essex Property Trust, a tour request that sits unanswered for a day or a maintenance ticket that goes quiet can lead to frustration and lost leases. EliseAI provides instant response for leasing, maintenance, and renewals, 24/7. 

 Worth a call?
